chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 06 of 2026 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Application in disposed of case 1. For orders on MA No.279/2026 (U/A) 2. For orders on MA No.280/2026 (Ex./A) 3. For orders on MA No.281/2026 (R/Surety) 29.01.2026 Mr. Muhammad Nasir Malik, Advocate for applicant / surety..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency is allowed. 2. Exemption is granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 3. This application is filed by the applicant seeking return of surety documents. As per contentions of learned Counsel, supported by report of Accountant of this Court, it seems that accused Ahmed Khan alias Meeral, who on 06.01.2026, was granted protective bail for a period of seven days, subject to his furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.20,000/-, for which applicant stood surety by depositing two original special savings certificates amounting to Rs.10,000/- each, had surrendered before the trial Court and has obtained interim pre-arrest bail, as is evident from letter dated 10.01.2026 of the trial Court, annexed with this application. Mr. Gulzar Ahmed Malano, learned Assistant Prosecutor General, present in Court in connection with other matters, waives notice and does not oppose this application. Accordingly, the application is allowed. Office is directed to return the surety documents to the applicant after proper identification and verification, as per rules. J U D G E Abdul Basit
